droneConfig.controlTileSubtitle: Pick a mode before you configure the sections below.
droneConfig.introSubtitle: Set up your flight options and then the sections below. When you are ready, start the control session at the bottom of the page.
droneConfig.modeFootnoteBci: BCI mode: choose a trained model, deploy it in NeuraFlow, then fly using the brain–computer signal from the interface. The session button unlocks only once the model is running.
droneConfig.modeFootnoteManual: Manual mode: fly with on-screen arrows — no BCI model or deployment. Extra settings stay lightweight so you can jump into a session quickly after what you set up below.

camera.label: Camera
camera.noSignalHint: Connect a camera to enable the live feed.
